title: Malevolent
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|an EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate|another EF76 Nebulon-B with the similar name [[Malevolence (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Malevolence'']]}}
'''''Malevolent''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that saw service with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During [[Operation: Clean Sweep]], the vessel challenged the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Endeavor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Endeavor'']] to a [[Battle between the Malevolent and the Endeavor|ship-to-ship duel]] which included both [[Warship/Legends|warships]]' contingents of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

==Behind the scenes==
While the occurrence of the space battle depicted in this mission, as well as the participants, was C-canon within the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] continuity, the outcome depends on the actions of the player and is therefore indeterminate. For lack of other canonical information, it should be assumed that the battle had no lasting effect (such as the destruction of either starship).

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
